allow: PowerShell($jq = Get-Command jq -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($jq\) { "jq found: $\($jq.Source\)" } else { "jq NOT found" }; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\hillr\\projects\\winnow64\\.claude\\statusline.jq"\) { "statusline.jq exists" } else { "statusline.jq MISSING" })
PowerShell($w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "winget: $\($w.Source\)" } else { "winget NOT found" })

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$j = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $parts = @\(\); $fh = $j.rate_limits.five_hour; if \($fh\) { $pct = [int]$fh.used_percentage; $rt = [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds\([long]$fh.resets_at\).LocalDateTime.ToString\('\\''HH:mm'\\''\); $parts += '\\''[Session: '\\'' + $pct + '\\''% \(Resets: '\\'' + $rt + '\\''\)]'\\'' }; $sd = $j.rate_limits.seven_day; if \($sd\) { $pct = [int]$sd.used_percentage; $rt = [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds\([long]$sd.resets_at\).LocalDateTime; $parts += '\\''[Week: '\\'' + $pct + '\\''% \(Resets: '\\'' + $rt.ToString\('\\''ddd HH:mm'\\''\) + '\\''\)]'\\'' }; if \($parts.Count -gt 0\) { $parts -join '\\'' '\\'' }')

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\hillr\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-hillr-projects-winnow64\\memory\\MEMORY.md"; $line = "- [Status line blank on Windows]\(statusline-windows-fix.md\) - committed jq statusLine shadows working PowerShell one; fixed via settings.local.json override"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { Add-Content -Path $f -Value $line -Encoding utf8 } else { Set-Content -Path $f -Value "# Memory`n`n$line" -Encoding utf8 }; "done")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p.get\('name'\), p.get\('environment',{}\).get\('QT_DIR'\), p.get\('cacheVariables',{}\).get\('CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH'\)\) for p in d.get\('configurePresets',[]\)]")

PowerShell($log = "$env:TEMP\\winnow_rot.log"; if \(Test-Path $log\) { Remove-Item $log }; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\hillr\\projects\\winnow64\\build\\win-release\\Release\\Winnow.exe" -RedirectStandardError $log; "Started fresh. Log cleared: $log")

statusLine.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$j = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $parts = @(); $fh = $j.rate_limits.five_hour; if ($fh) { $pct = [int]$fh.used_percentage; $rt = [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds([long]$fh.resets_at).LocalDateTime.ToString('HH:mm'); $parts += '[Session: ' + $pct + '% (Resets: ' + $rt + ')]' }; $sd = $j.rate_limits.seven_day; if ($sd) { $pct = [int]$sd.used_percentage; $rt = [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds([long]$sd.resets_at).LocalDateTime; $parts += '[Week: ' + $pct + '% (Resets: ' + $rt.ToString('ddd HH:mm') + ')]' }; if ($parts.Count -gt 0) { $parts -join ' ' }"
